description: Paper trail of articles this subagent has shipped. Append one entry per publish.

entries.notes: Seed article. Pillar piece covering the highest-volume rental term in the tracker.
PILLAR ARTICLE. Comprehensive MUTCD guide covering device categories, barricade types, AFADs, flagger requirements, and crashworthiness standards.
Type A/B/C specs, trailer vs truck-mounted decision matrix, daily/weekly/monthly rates, lamp requirements per MUTCD §6L.06.
MUTCD §6E.04 operational rules, STOP/SLOW vs Red/Yellow Lens types, single-lane traffic requirement, purchase vs rental economics.
Type I/II/III per MUTCD §6F.63, material comparison (steel vs plastic vs water-filled), speed/duration decision tree, provider vetting checklist.
Portable signals (ATSSA-certified), rumble strips, cones vs drums, NCHRP 350 / MASH crashworthiness, portable vs permanent decision framework.
